LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KWAI LAM'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER $62,087.50 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS AND HAS REVIEWED THE PARTIES' DECLARATIONS. THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT HAS NOT SOUGHT A MULTIPLIER NOR COSTS FOR OTHER PERSONNEL OUTWEIGHS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS FOR ANY EXCESS COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH THE DEPOSITIONS AND POST APPEAL HOURS. PLAINTIFF'S OTHER OBJECTIONS ARE NOT PERSUASIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: R. A. HOWELL, CSR #2542

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT KWAI HO LAM'S C.C.P. SECTION 425.16 SLAPP MOTION. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS LATE ISSUED TENTATIVE RULING (GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT AS PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 425.16) AND TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AS TO THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATIONS OF KAREN LUM AND DENISE LEADBETTER ARE OVERRULED (ON THE LUM DECLARATION: PARAGRAPH FIVE, PORTION REGARDING FILING SUIT. ON THE LEADBETTER DECLARATION; PARAGRAPH THREE, LINE SIXTEEN, PORTION ABOUT FILING SUIT. PARAGRAPH FIVE, PORTION WHERE LUM TOLD TO SUE ON THE NOTICE). (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER $62,087.50 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES. THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS AND HAS REVIEWED THE PARTIES' DECLARATIONS. THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT HAS NOT SOUGHT A MULTIPLIER NOR COSTS FOR OTHER PERSONNEL OUTWEIGHS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS FOR ANY EXCESS COSTS IN CONNECTION WITH THE DEPOSITIONS AND POST APPEAL HOURS. PLAINTIFF'S OTHER OBJECTIONS ARE NOT PERSUASIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: R. A. HOWELL, CSR 2542
